title: 基于hexo和github搭建个人博客
text: hexo常用命令1$ hexo deploy hexo -d 更换主题 安装next主题，以npm方式进行安装1$ npm install hexo-theme-next@latest 修改主题123cd ${project_root}\_config.ymltheme: next #启用next主题$ hexo generate 更换样式1234567cd ${project_root}\node_modules\hexo-theme-next\_config.yml对next模板的默认Muse进行修改# Schemes#scheme: Muse#scheme: Mist#scheme: Piscesscheme: Gemini 自定义主题本站中使用了tomotoes主题 更多主题可参考 https://hexo.io/themes/设置https://my.oschina.net/zhengqingya/blog/3070979

title: Hello World
text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
